name: Fantasy World - Modern
description:
A fantasy world set in modern times, with advanced magic and science and all that stuff. There's elves, dwarves, robots, furries, demi humans, mythical beings, humans, monsters, and whatever other fantasy elements you can think about, I think. I tried to make this very open for whatever you wanna do, so feel free to use whatever persona you want and do whatever you want.

My first scenario bot. I tested a bit to see if it would work properly, but I can't guarantee everything. Please, if there's anything happening that shouldn't be happening, leave it on the comments, I'll try to take a look at it.

This is a world that I think is pretty interesting, so I made a bot of it. I'll probably use a world like this one for any other characters I make, just because it gives that much freedom for the user.

To be honest, I didn't have a lot in mind when I made this, so I'm not sure of what you could do in general, but I didn't put much in the bot's prompt, so yeah, you can probably do whatever you want.

The bot is aimed at the worldbuilding and the NPC's, so there's not much of a story. Shouldn't be too much of a problem though. I mean, it probably just gives you that much more freedom, you could be a historic figure for one.

This bot narrates in a way that leaves the user pretty free to do their own actions. Even when it does act for user, it's usually something minor that shouldn't matter much.

By the way, VERY IMPORTANT, the story starts in a bar, but that's mostly just so the bot has an idea of the way it should narrate the story. Your first move could be to leave the bar, if you want to. It's not even specified if the user's in the bar or not, so idk, you could be a dragon diving in the bar's roof headfirst if you want to. Or just an elf peeking in. Or maybe a demi-human passing by outside, unaware of the events going on inside. Go crazy, no limits.

(Okay, so, one really cool thing about this bot. Though it does act as {{user}} sometimes, it describes things well, so you can use it to test your persona. You can see if it's working like how you want it to. It will describe your persona's appearance and demeanor pretty accurately. Try using {{user}} steps inside the bar as the first message, you'll see what I mean.)

When testing, I've found that JanitorLLM Beta (temperature at around 0.8 or 0.9) seemed to work closer to the way I desired, but use whatever you want.
creator: Riceball01
